missing_critical_conditions: No explicit requirement that candidate distinguishes planning recommendations from executable authorization in every commit_plan, push_result_report, and completion_state section.
No explicit requirement that validation_matrix records done:check as the blocking validator with unknown or not_yet_run status rather than implying pass/fail evidence.
No explicit requirement that upload_receipt avoids fabricated timestamps, actor identity, run IDs, or repository URLs when absent from the fixture.
recommended_adjustments: Add a hard gate requiring each action-bearing output section to preserve dry-run or synthetic-only status.
Add a failure condition for fabricating receipt metadata such as timestamps, commit hashes, branch names, remotes, actors, or run IDs.
Clarify that Korean commit message policy must be preserved as policy text or planned message intent, not claimed as an executed commit message.
Keep the fixture-specific private path gate, but pair it with a generalized private/raw material exclusion rule so candidates cannot pass by blocking only that exact path.

boundary_review.remaining_risk: Minor risk that candidates could produce plausible but invented receipt metadata unless explicitly forbidden.

claim_ceiling: This gate can support quality-equivalence judgment for synthetic github_upload_publish_v0 planning/receipt outputs only. It cannot certify real repository state, real validator results, live commit readiness, or push authorization.
